what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for a design-asset image: a PNG icon named Feature_8_Filters under the design-assets channel, identified by an image:// address and a blob reference, with version 1 and empty alt text and links.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
Records an image/png asset with id icons/Feature_8_Filters
Version 1 with a single version entry
created and updated timestamps are identical
standouts: Single version with no subsequent updates
conventions: Follows YAML frontmatter ledger format with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, and version fields
Uses image:// address scheme and blob:// reference
Breaks expected image metadata completeness by omitting width, height, and alt text
concerns: Zero width/height suggests image metadata extraction may have failed or not run
Empty alt text limits accessibility and discoverability
No links or usage context provided
created and updated are identical, indicating no edits since ingestion
notes: A first-version, dragnet-sourced metadata stub for a filters feature icon that is addressable but lacks dimensions, alt text, and relationships.
questions: Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?
What visual representation does Feature_8_Filters contain?
Where in the product is this icon intended to be used?

purpose_vs_actual: Partially matches: the file is clearly meant to catalog a versioned design-asset image, but the record is incomplete because width, height, alt text, and links are all empty.
intention_signals: The file appears to be registering a filters feature icon into the design-assets channel so it can be referenced by a stable address, with provenance and versioning, even though descriptive metadata is not yet filled in.
novelty: The record is an image asset entry with zero dimensions, empty alt text, and no relationships, which is unusual for a cataloged design asset.
contribution: Provides a versioned, addressable metadata stub for a filters icon asset, including provenance (source dragnet, author session) and a stable blob reference, which a fused system could keep as an asset pointer once dimensions and alt text are populated.
summary_for_embedding: Metadata ledger entry for a PNG icon named Feature_8_Filters in the design-assets channel, version 1, with zero recorded dimensions, empty alt text, and no links.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and version a filters feature icon asset for reference within the design-assets channel.
